fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for a VAT clause, which is used to provide a VAT description associated with a sales line on a sales invoice, credit memo, or other sales document.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the descriptive text that is associated with a VAT clause.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional description of a VAT clause.
